design_language.aesthetic: High-energy, bold, and youthful. Combines 90s retro patterns (checkerboard) with modern pop-art elements (starbursts, neon colors).
design_language.visual_approach: Framed content. A solid dark background frames a central 'stage' (pink border) where the action happens.

color_logic.primary_background: Deep Forest Green (#004d00 approx) - Used as the outer canvas to make inner colors pop.
color_logic.secondary_background: Dark/Light Green Checkerboard - Used inside the frame to add texture and retro vibe.
color_logic.accent_color_1: Hot Pink / Magenta (#ff00cc approx) - Used for borders, logo, and bottom banners. Creates high contrast against green.
color_logic.accent_color_2: Lime Green / Neon Green (#ccff00 approx) - Used for starbursts, sticker backgrounds, and highlight text. Signals 'freshness' and 'energy'.
color_logic.text_color: White (for main headlines) and Black (for sticker text).
color_logic.color_psychology: Green suggests freshness/food, Pink suggests fun/youth, High Contrast suggests boldness/clarity.

typography.logo_font: Custom, lowercase, italicized, bold sans-serif with a futuristic/tech feel.
typography.headline_font: Bold, condensed sans-serif (likely Impact or similar). All caps for authority.
typography.sticker_font: Handwritten / Marker style. Adds a human, informal, 'street' touch.
typography.hierarchy: Logo -> Main Promise ('Lowest Price') -> Food Image -> Informal Tagline (Sticker).

graphic_elements.framing: Thick hot pink border surrounding the main content area.
graphic_elements.starburst: Lime green explosion shape with pink outline. Used to highlight the product or add dynamic energy behind the food.
graphic_elements.stickers: Rectangular lime green shapes with slight rotation, resembling sticky notes or tape labels.
graphic_elements.pattern: Subtle checkerboard pattern in the background of the content area.

layout_specifics.image_placement: Centered. A pair of hands holding a large white bowl of Biryani. The hands ground the image, making it feel personal and portion-sized.
layout_specifics.text_placement: Top: Brand logo and main headline ('Lowest price guaranteed...'). Bottom Right: Sticker tagline.
layout_specifics.graphic_placement: Large starburst behind the left side of the bowl.

ads.message_delivery: Focuses on portion size ('Big bowl') vs. Cost ('small price'). The hands emphasize the 'heaviness' or value of the bowl.

layout_specifics.image_placement: Centered. A pink bowl of creamy pasta. A fork is lifting noodles from the top right, adding action/movement to the static image.
layout_specifics.text_placement: Top Left: Brand logo and headline. Bottom Right: Sticker tagline.
layout_specifics.graphic_placement: Starburst behind the left side of the bowl.

ads.message_delivery: Uses rhyming slang ('chhotu toll') to make the low price memorable and fun. The lifting fork triggers appetite appeal.

layout_specifics.image_placement: Right-aligned / Diagonal. A large roll enters from the top right corner, taking up significant space. Close-up macro shot showing texture.
layout_specifics.text_placement: Top Left: Logo. Middle Right (on food): Sticker tagline. Bottom: Full-width pink banner with white text.
layout_specifics.graphic_placement: Starburst on the left side to balance the heavy image on the right.

ads.message_delivery: Punchy, aggressive copy ('Roll hard'). The bottom banner reinforces the 'Guarantee' strongly.

layout_specifics.image_placement: Identical to Ad 3. Diagonal entry from top right.

ads.message_delivery: Repetition of the successful creative format for the Rolls category.

layout_specifics.image_placement: Center/Right. A hand holding a toasted sandwich. The angle is slightly tilted, matching the casual vibe.
layout_specifics.text_placement: Top: Logo and Headline. Left (overlapping food): Sticker tagline.
layout_specifics.graphic_placement: Starburst at the bottom right corner.

ads.message_delivery: Uses 'Hinglish' (Hindi + English) - 'Taste ka swag sasta price tag'. Connects 'style/coolness' (swag) with affordability.

strategic_summary.visual_hook: The neon green and hot pink against dark green is a unique ownable asset. It stands out in a feed dominated by red/orange food ads.
strategic_summary.value_proposition: The design screams 'Discount' without looking 'Cheap'. The retro-pop style makes the low price feel like a cool trend rather than a clearance sale.
strategic_summary.consistency: Highly templated. The frame, the checkerboard, the starburst, and the sticker placement are consistent, building strong brand recognition.
